text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 115 

HCBS_SRVC_CD 

LABEL: Home- and Community-Based Services Service Code 

DESCRIPTION: Codes indicating that the service represents a long-term care home and community-based service 
(HCBS) or support for an individual with chronic medical and/or mental conditions. The codes are to 
help clearly delineate between acute care and long-term care provided in the home and community
